name: Medusa
charDescription: Gorgon priestess of the cursed temple. Petrifies foes with her gaze and strikes from afar with venom-tipped serpent bolts.
abilityDescriptionsShort: Loose a venom-tipped bolt at a single target.
Spit a wave of venom into an area. Slows foes caught in it.
Coil and slither away. Knocks up foes at the launch point.
Pierce all in your line of sight. Stone-roots whoever you hit.
abilityDescriptions: Loose a venom-tipped serpent bolt, dealing {1}.
Rain venom on an area, dealing {1} and applying {2} on hit.
Coil and slither away from the ground, dealing {1} and applying {2} on hit.
Stare a piercing curse through obstacles and enemies, dealing {1} and petrifying (root) any target struck for {2}.
